subject: Upcoming appointment reminder
body: We are reaching out to inform you that your forthcoming ambulatory consultation is scheduled for Tuesday at 14:30. Please ensure you bring all necessary documentation, including identification, insurance, and medication lists. Kindly note our privacy practices enclosed and the cancellation policy requiring 24-hour notice. Should you need to reschedule, contact the practice.

subject: Flu shot availability
body: Our immunization clinic will administer seasonal influenza vaccines next week. Individuals with contraindications should consult a provider prior to arrival. Walk-ins are permitted; however, capacity is limited. Parking information is posted on the website.

subject: Invitation to survey on spirituality and coping
body: As part of a Religious Studies methods seminar, we are conducting a study on spirituality and coping among undergraduates. Participation is voluntary and you may skip any question. The survey takes approximately 15–20 minutes. IRB approval #2023-17. If you consent, please review the attached information sheet before proceeding.

subject: Reminder: focus group about campus interfaith life
body: We invite you to a small focus group discussing interfaith practices on campus. The discussion will be recorded for analysis. Participation is voluntary. Sessions last about 60 minutes. IRB approval #2023-17. Refreshments provided.
